name: Binary Signature Scan
description: Binary and file-system signature matching with YARA rules.
long_description: Runs recursive YARA scans against binaries, folders, or artifacts and reports matched signatures.

fields.label: Target File/Directory
fields.help: Path to file or directory to scan.

fields.label: YARA Rules Path
fields.help: Path to a YARA rule file (.yar or .yara) used to match signatures against the target.

fields.label: Print Matching Strings
fields.help: Include matching string values from triggered YARA rules in the scan output.

safety.consent_message: YARA can process sensitive binaries/artifacts. Ensure approved forensic scope.
